title: Happy Speed - Happy Ghast Enchantment
description: This mod adds a harness enchantment that makes Happy Ghasts move faster.
body:
## 🌐 ITITAN Hosting
[![ITITAN Hosting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/3geETR/images/refs/heads/main/Other/ititan.png)](https://ititanhosting.com/game/minecraft)


# **Happy Speed**

This mod adds a harness enchantment that makes Happy Ghasts move faster. Because they are extremely, ridiculously, annoyingly slow.


## Use on Happy Ghast
![happy ghast](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExMXNsa2tvamFyeWpsM2k4ZG9mNnpmbXdzM3FtbGp4dWlkMnQ0OHliOCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/o9L4uwHTGub96oyG7a/giphy.gif)

## How do you get it?
- Happy Speed can be acquired **via bartering with piglins**, who may offer enchanted books and white harness with a random level of Happy Speed. 
- Enchanted books and white harness with a random level of Happy Speed may appear **in bastion remnant "generic" chests**.
- Happy Speed is a treasure enchantment. **It cannot be obtained from enchanting in an enchanting table.** It also cannot be obtained from most chest loot (except from chests in bastion remnants), fishing, or trading.

![happy speed item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51bc957b40d96944f89ec46f26c0dd958172cede.gif)

## Using anvil
![anvil](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExa2llczVpbjE5cmI5Mzlqbnp5bjQ2aTV6eWZlYzFnYWZ5Zmk3amRhbSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/CwR6Zkq9TKgHkx4AJN/giphy.gif)

## Increase Values

Tier   |   %    | Block/second

Tier 1 ->   %81     3.91 b/s

Tier 2 ->   %102    4.36 b/s

Tier 3 ->   %123    4.81 b/s



**Your feedback is important to us. You can write on Discord. Discord name: tpcoffline**
